Keyboard.description:
Listen to keyboard event
You can also listen to specific keyboard key by right clicking the output port
Make sure to turn on AllowResync if you need to reupdate other node

Element.description: If this not connected to anything, this node will listen to window

Listen.description: Start listening to mouse click event

MouseClick.description:
Listen to mouse, pointer, or touch click event
Make sure to turn on AllowResync if you need to reupdate other node

Element.description: If this not connected to anything, this node will listen to window

Listen.description: Start listening to mouse click event

MouseScroll.description:
Listen to mouse scroll event
Make sure to turn on AllowResync if you need to reupdate other node

Element.description: If this not connected to anything, this node will listen to window

Listen.description: Start listening to mouse click event

Movement.description:
Listen to mouse scroll event
Make sure to turn on AllowResync if you need to reupdate other node

Element.description: If this not connected to anything, this node will listen to window

Listen.description: Start listening to mouse click event

EventMoveX.description: Total X-axis movement after the previous 'pointermove' event

EventMoveY.description: Total Y-axis movement after the previous 'pointermove' event

EventClientX.description: Pointer X-axis coordinate in local (DOM content)

EventClientY.description: Pointer Y-axis coordinate in local (DOM content)

Button.description: User Interface (UI) for calling a function port

File.description: User Interface for handling file input

URL.description: Blob URL that can only be used locally in this browser

SliderBox.description: User Interface for handling number input with a horizontal slider

\"0\".description: You can also right click to create a new port

TextBox.description: User Interface for handling text input

Changed.description: This can be used to call a function every time the value was changed
